# CloudKit.ShareParticipantType

**Enumeration**

Determines whether a participant can modify the list of participants of a shared record.

## Declaration

```swift
interface CloudKit.ShareParticipantType {
	const String UNKNOWN;
	const String PRIVATE_USER;
	const String PUBLIC_USER;
	const String OWNER;
};
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **OWNER**: The owner of the shared record who can add private users but not add public users.
- **PRIVATE_USER**: Participants who were invited to share the record by the owner.
- **PUBLIC_USER**: Participants who accepted a shared record by accessing the share URL.
- **UNKNOWN**: Unknown type of participant.

## Enumerations

- **CloudKit.AppleIDButtonTheme**: Specifies the look of the Apple ID button.
- **CloudKit.DatabaseScope**: Available database scopes.
- **CloudKit.QueryFilterComparator**: The comparators you use to create queries.
- **CloudKit.ReferenceAction**: The delete action for a reference object.
- **CloudKit.ShareParticipantAcceptanceStatus**: The status of a participant accepting a share invitation.
- **CloudKit.ShareParticipantPermission**: The status of a participant accepting a share invitation.
- **CloudKit.SubscriptionType**: The type of subscription.
